data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan and Sarawak until 1:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan dan Sarawak sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, western part of Samui, southeastern part of Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan and Sulu until 1:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka, barat Samui, tenggara Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Sarawak:  Sibu (Selangau), Mukah (Mukah) and Bintulu until 3:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Sarawak:  Sibu (Selangau), Mukah (Mukah) dan Bintulu sehingga 3:00 petang; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
